title: An Act creating a commission establishing a Massachusetts Caribbean American Cultural Center

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Worrell of Boston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 3602) of Christopher J. Worrell for an investigation by a special commission (including members of the General Court) relative to establishing a statewide Massachusetts Caribbean American cultural center in the city of Boston.  Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development

related_entities.name: committee on Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development
